data.name: OpeningImportService.InternalServerError
data.value: An unexpected error occurred during the opening import process.

data.name: OpeningImportService.JobNotFound
data.value: Opening import job was not found.

data.name: OpeningImportService.AlreadyApplied
data.value: This opening import job has already been applied.

data.name: OpeningImportService.CommitHasErrors
data.value: Commit is not possible while there are invalid rows.

data.name: OpeningImportService.EmptyWorkbook
data.value: No processable sheets were found in the workbook.

data.name: OpeningImportService.GoodsReceiptHeaderConflict
data.value: Receipt header values must be consistent per project. Receipt number, date and warehouse must match.

data.name: OpeningImportService.GoodsReceiptBatchConflict
data.value: Within each project and batch, fish stock and average gram must be consistent in opening receipts.

data.name: OpeningImportService.TemplateGeneratedByOpeningImport
data.value: This template was generated for opening import.

data.name: OpeningImportService.CleanupNoDeletedTestRecordFound
data.value: No deleted test records found to clean.

data.name: OpeningImportService.CleanupDeletedRecordsCleared
data.value: Deleted test records were cleared successfully.

data.name: OpeningImportService.CleanupCouldNotClearAutomatically
data.value: Some deleted test records could not be cleaned automatically.

data.name: OpeningImportService.CleanupHasRelations
data.value: Cannot delete because related records exist: {0}

data.name: OpeningImportService.ResetNoRecordsToClear
data.value: No existing records were found to reset.

data.name: OpeningImportService.ResetPermanentClearCompleted
data.value: Linked operational data was removed permanently.

data.name: OpeningImportService.MortalityBatchNotFound
data.value: Matching mortality batch could not be found.

data.name: OpeningImportService.DerivedOpeningStockNotice
data.value: Opening stock row was derived from opening movements.

data.name: OpeningImportService.Validation.AverageGramMustBePositive
data.value: Average gram must be greater than zero.

data.name: OpeningImportService.Validation.CageAlreadyExists
data.value: Duplicate cage code already exists in project: {0}

data.name: OpeningImportService.Validation.CageAssignedToDifferentProject
data.value: Cage is assigned to another project: {0} (Project: {1})

data.name: OpeningImportService.Validation.ExchangeRateMustBePositive
data.value: Exchange rate must be greater than zero.

data.name: OpeningImportService.Validation.FeedGramMustBePositive
data.value: Feed gram must be greater than zero.

data.name: OpeningImportService.Validation.FishCountMustBePositive
data.value: Fish count must be greater than zero.

data.name: OpeningImportService.Validation.MortalityCountMustBePositive
data.value: Mortality count must be greater than zero.

data.name: OpeningImportService.Validation.OpeningStockLocationRequired
data.value: Opening stock row requires cage code or warehouse code.

data.name: OpeningImportService.Validation.ShipmentCountMustBePositive
data.value: Shipment fish count must be greater than zero.
